channel.title: sockstat on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in sockstat on IT notes

item.title: sockstat
item.description: The sockstat command list open Internet or UNIX domain sockets. List open tcp in ipv4: # sockstat -4l Show connectd sockets in port 443 and tcp: # sockstat -P tcp -p 443 -c List unix sockets: # sockstat -u
